taxonomy: Platantheroides unellezii is classified as a flowering plant in the orchid family (Orchidaceae). It belongs to the genus Platantheroides, which is a small group of orchids. Within this genus, it is considered to be a species of terrestrial orchid. The classification is part of a larger system that categorizes living organisms using the binomial nomenclature system.
